title: Bigger Block Placement Range
description: This datapack adds an enchantment that increases your block placement range!
body: This datapack is a standalone version of [uiinpui's Enchantments](https://modrinth.com/datapack/uiinpuis-enchantments-new) that only adds the Big Hands enchantment, increasing your block placement range by 0.5 blocks up to 2.5 blocks at the max level of 5. You have to put this enchantment on chestplates.
